gradient.$description: Nebula dark-mode gradient tokens — purple to blue, the primary visual identity of the Nebula theme.

primary.$description: Primary gradient — vibrant purple to periwinkle blue. Used on primary buttons and hero elements.

accent.$description: Accent gradient — primary shade to teal green.

surface.$description: Surface gradient — subtle purple/blue sheen. Color(0x328055E0) and Color(0x324A96E8): alpha=0x32 (20% opacity).

surface-primary.$description: Surface gradient tinted with primary. Color(0x338055E0) and Color(0x336340B8): alpha=0x33 (20% opacity).

surface-accent.$description: Surface gradient tinted with accent. Color(0x334A96E8) and Color(0x3332B88C): alpha=0x33 (20% opacity).
